case_title: CONEXWEST VS. INNOVATION CONSTRUCTION (ORIGINALLY: ANDREW PUCHKOV)

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF CONEXWEST RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONEXWEST
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 AMENDED TO CHANGE DEFENDANT TO INNOVATION CONSTRUCTION FILED BY CONEXWEST AS TO DEFENDANT INNOVATION CONSTRUCTION
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
NOTICE SENT OUT TO PLAINTIFF CONEXWEST

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. VENUE LIES IN ALAMEDA COUNTY. A CONTRACT IS FORMED IN THE PLACE WHERE THE ACCEPTING PARTY IS LOCATED WHEN THE CONTRACT IS ACCEPTED. (WARD MFG. CO. V. MILEY (1955) 131 CAL APP 2ND 603.) HERE, PLAINTIFF PROVIDED A QUOTE AND DEFENDANT ACCEPTED IT IN ALAMEDA COUNTY, AND THE CONTRACT WAS PERFORMED THERE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CONEXWEST REPRESENTED BY ERIC BRODRICK, HEAD OF SALES. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONEXWEST

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-16-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF CONEXWEST IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ERIC BRODRICK, HEAD OF SALES. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS SUBMITTED TO THE COURT ON 10/26/18 ORDERED DESTROYED.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, AMENDING CLAIM TO CHANGE DEFENDANT FROM ANDREW PUCHKOV TO INNOVATION CONSTRUCTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONEXWEST
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
ORDER TO VACATE DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE
